dict.string: Eidos can weave your recently-played Apple Music into your briefing. Music history never leaves your iPhone.
Eidos reads your calendar to give you context-aware briefings and reminders. Event data never leaves your iPhone.
Eidos uses your contacts to understand who you mean when you say names. Contact data never leaves your iPhone.
Eidos reads a minimal set of health metrics (sleep, steps, heart rate, active energy) to personalize your morning briefing. Data never leaves your iPhone — only insights are stored.
Eidos doesn't write to HealthKit. This permission is required by iOS when requesting any health access.
For ambient place memory, allow Always. Eidos records only significant changes — never your exact path — and only on-device.
Eidos notes the places you go (home, work, gym) so your briefing knows your context. Location never leaves your iPhone.
Eidos transcribes your voice on-device so you can chat hands-free. Audio never leaves your iPhone.
Eidos uses motion activity (walking, running, driving) and step count to personalize your briefing. Never leaves your iPhone.
Eidos reads and creates reminders on your behalf. Reminder data never leaves your iPhone.
Eidos uses Apple's on-device speech recognition to turn your voice into text. Your speech is never sent to a server.
